name: Ziti Casserole --291284
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and remove stems from mushrooms. Quarter large mushrooms.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon butter or margarine in a large skillet over moderate heat.
3. Stir-fry mushroom caps and stems for 1 minute until coated. Remove them.
4. Add 1 tablespoon oil, broccoli, and carrots to the skillet. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Add 2 tablespoons water; cover and cook for 3 minutes until vegetables are crisp and tender. Drain.
6. Melt 4 tablespoons butter or margarine in a separate pan.
7. Stir in 3 tablespoons flour. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring once or twice.
8. Continue stirring and slowly add light cream. Increase heat slightly.
9. Stir in 1 cup Parmesan cheese and 1 cup sharp Cheddar cheese. Add 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon pepper.
10. Stir until the sauce thickens and bubbles.
11. Gently mix cooked, drained ziti with mushrooms, carrots, broccoli, and 1 cup walnuts in a large bowl.
12. Add the cheese sauce and toss gently.
13. Place the mixture into a 2-quart baking dish. Cover tightly with foil.
14. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
15. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
